explanation: The phrase "The autopilot shall change states from TRANSITION to STANDBY" maps to the LTL formula "state_is_STANDBY U state_is_TRANSITION".  The phrase "when the pilot is in control (standby)" maps to the atomic proposition "standby". The structure "The autopilot shall change states from TRANSITION to STANDBY when the pilot is in control (standby)" becomes the temporal implication "standby -> (state_is_STANDBY U state_is_TRANSITION)".

explanation_dict.natural_language: The autopilot shall change states from TRANSITION to STANDBY
when the pilot is in control (standby)
